entities.name: DEBRE ZEIT
entities.description: The specific location in Ethiopia where the study was conducted

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: DZ10-11
entities.description: A desi variety of chickpea used as the female parent

entities.name: ICCU2
entities.description: A kabuli variety of chickpea used in the cross

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL CROSS POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of manually transferring pollen between chickpea varieties

entities.name: SAME-DAY EMASCULATION AND POLLINATION
entities.description: A crossing method where emasculation and pollination occur on the same day at 09.00 h

entities.name: NEXT-DAY POLLINATION
entities.description: A crossing method where emasculation occurs at 16.00 h and pollination occurs at 08.30 h the next day

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The outdoor environment where crossing was performed

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled indoor environment where crossing was performed

entities.name: HIGH MINIMUM TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Environmental factor that had deleterious effects on the success rate

entities.name: HIGH HUMIDITY
entities.description: Environmental factor that had deleterious effects on the success rate

entities.name: SUCCESS RATE
entities.description: The measure of effectiveness of the artificial cross pollination
